guardrails: W1.5.218 records reviewer decisions after the W1.5.215 stream, W1.5.216 runtime UX, and W1.5.217 A8 blocker repair handoffs.
Every W1.5.218 decision remains needs_followup; no FR, A4 item, A8 item, EXIT-P1-1, or EXIT-P1-10 is accepted or marked ready.

W1.5.218 does not implement runtime/Desktop production behavior, accepted spec changes, ADR changes, schema changes, generated schema changes, dependency changes, packaging, updater work, or baseline docx changes.

No field may contain raw prompts, raw model output, uploaded-file bytes, instruction text, HITL prompt content, custom decision values, response bodies, artifact bodies, secure paths, cache paths, output directory values, full destination paths, credential values, raw file content, or user staged file content.
FR-015 remains excluded while ADR-0012 is Proposed.
accepted_items and implemented_items remain zero; explicit needs_followup decisions are not acceptance.

reviewer_contract.reviewer_source: post-repair review of W1.5.215 stream repair, W1.5.216 runtime UX repair, and W1.5.217 A8 conformance repair handoffs

blocker_repair_decision_items.rationale: The stream repair handoff provides a reviewer-consumable package, but formal A4 acceptance for the default collapsed stream path is still not recorded.
remaining_acceptance_blockers: Formal A4 reviewer acceptance or rejection for the default collapsed stream path is still not recorded.
FR-009 remains blocked until the reviewer decision record consumes this repaired stream evidence package.
source_acceptance_blockers: The evidence is still matrix metadata and does not record formal first-viewport A4 acceptance.

next_action_refs: Plan final A4 acceptance evidence for the default collapsed stream path without marking FR-009 accepted.
